scanFolders.description: Folders at the vault root to scan for `- [ ]` checkbox loops.

inboxFile.description: Path (relative to vault root) where manual loops get appended.

stakeholder.description: The primary stakeholder. Drives the P1 capacity bucket, the weekly summary, and the pLevel tag (e.g. `P1:Boss`).

name.description: Display name shown in the UI. e.g. 'Boss', 'Manager', or a person's first name.

tag.description: Tag used in pLevel strings. Typically same as name, no spaces.

capacityMax.description: Max active P1:<tag> loops before the capacity gate fires.

weeklySummary.description: Whether to render the StakeholderUpdateCard (weekly draft).

staleDays.description: Loops with this tag untouched for N days raise a flag on the weekly draft.

capacityMax.description: Max active P1:self loops before the capacity gate fires.

scannerStakeholders.description: Additional names the vault scanner should detect in task text and tag as P3:<Name>. Lowercase keyword → display name.

subgroupHints.description: Subgroup-name substring → work-mode hint for classification fallback.

repos.description: Codebases you work in. Each entry surfaces in the ClaudeChat repo picker so you can run `claude -p` against the right tree instead of the vault.

name.description: Display name shown in the picker. e.g. 'frontend', 'api', 'infra'.

path.description: Absolute path to the repo on disk.
